title: The Craftsmen (Dwarven Stonemasons)
bodyText: [[root-darkpass|Root]] Darkpass's guild — [[koviz]]'s builders and miners, always insular ("the dwarves stick together"), now a sealed mini-town behind a metal gate while the rest of the city dies. The reckless dig into [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] is theirs; so is whatever Root is really planning ([[thread-roots-plan]]). Maps: art/road-to-stonemasons-guild.jpg, art/stonemasons-guild.jpg.
